novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Was not Diaochan’s father. She did not exist.
	Turned Lü Bu against Dong Zhuo over an unnamed maid by chance, not through a premeditated plot.

full_text:
Wang Yun (Zishi) 王允 (子師)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Yun (王允), styledZishi (子師), was born in Taiyuan. Diaochan’s father. Orchestrated the plot which resulted in Dong Zhuo’s death. Wang Yun was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Wang Yun lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
